Remarks/Remarques: Three segment curve representing section, channel, and overbank flow. The lower end of the curve is more ambiguous due to occasional scour and fill in the channel causing scatter. Discharge below 0.240 m3/s and above 332 m3/s is automatically graded as estimated. The range of stage covers 0.739 m to 4.114 m.
